articles.title: Bluesky’s interim CEO, Toni Schneider, drops the ‘interim’
articles.description: Schneider, who formerly served as the CEO of Automattic and is a partner at True Ventures, says he is "all in" on the unconventional social media platform.

articles.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
articles.description: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAi's senior leadership, including a long-time former employee.

articles.title: Filing: College app Fizz accuses VC of sharing confidential startup information with rival Sidechat
articles.description: Fizz has expanded its lawsuit against rival Sidechat, alleging that a Maveron VC shared its confidential information obtained during a fundraising meeting with the competing startup.

articles.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
articles.description: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

articles.title: A new app, HyperTexting, turns the open web into a scrollable social media-like feed
articles.description: HyperTexting's new app aims to make the open web feel more like social media by turning websites, blogs, newsletters, and podcasts into a scrollable feed, while also making it easier to post to your own website.

articles.title: China is catching up to Elon Musk’s reusable rockets

articles.title: Disney+ is considering a free streaming tier, report says

articles.title: Dumb Co dared me to trade my iPhone for a hacked flip phone

articles.title: Netflix could be planning ‘always-on’ live TV channels

articles.title: EU threatens Meta with fines over addictive features on Facebook and Instagram
articles.description: The tech giant is in breach of the Digital Services Act by focusing on features like infinite scroll, autoplay, push notifications, and the highly personalized recommendation algorithms, the European Commission said.

articles.title: Florida ransomware negotiator convicted for helping ransomware gang extort US companies

articles.title: Hugging Face’s CEO on why companies are done renting their AI
articles.description: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half the Fortune 500. Delangue has seen the same story play out again and again: companies start […]

articles.title: Don’t want to invest in Elon Musk? Two new ETFs explicitly exclude him
articles.description: The new exchange-traded funds exclude companies that are founded, controlled, or led by Elon Musk. That means no SpaceX or Tesla.

articles.title: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s No. 2 role
articles.description: OpenAI's No. 2 executive, Fidji Simo, is stepping down from her full-time role after her medical leave proved longer than expected — a leadership vacuum that comes at a tricky time as the company eyes a possible IPO and races to catch Anthropic in the enterprise market.

articles.title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6

articles.title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise

articles.title: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **AI竞争与法律纠纷**：苹果起诉OpenAI涉嫌窃取商业机密；OpenAI表示GPT 5.6将成为微软Copilot 365的“首选模型”，引发双方合作破裂的猜测；Hugging Face CEO指出企业正停止租用AI模型，转向自研。
2. **半导体与硬件投资**：SK海力士以265亿美元完成美国史上最大外国IPO，被敦促新建美国晶圆厂；Oatomic融资3亿美元，目标构建仅需2万量子比特的可行量子计算机。
3. **流媒体与社交平台变革**：Disney+考虑推出免费广告支持层级；Netflix可能计划推出“全天候”直播电视频道；新应用HyperTexting将开放网页转化为可滚动的社交媒体式信息流。
4. **监管与安全事件**：欧盟威胁对Meta因Facebook和Instagram的成瘾性功能处以罚款；佛罗里达州一名勒索软件谈判员因协助勒索团伙敲诈美国公司被判有罪。
5. **中国航天与手机制造**：中国正追赶马斯克的可回收火箭技术；继苹果之后，印度智能手机制造热潮进入新阶段，Vivo与当地企业成立合资公司。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：SK海力士创纪录的265亿美元IPO不仅刷新美国外资上市历史，更凸显半导体产业链向美国本土转移的加速趋势。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **PyTorch性能优化与模型推理加速**：Hugging Face发布PyTorch性能分析系列第三部分，强调注意力机制的重要性；同时推出原生速度的vLLM transformers建模后端，并更新了🤗 Kernels库，旨在提升AI模型推理效率。
2. **AI代理与数据策略发展**：Hugging Face推出“面向智能体的数据”项目，并发布LeRobot v0.6.0版本（聚焦想象、评估与改进），以及“PRX Part 4：我们的数据策略”，持续强化AI代理的数据基础与迭代能力。
3. **云部署与存储零成本迁移**：Hugging Face与Amazon SageMaker Studio实现一键集成，支持在Foundry托管计算上运行模型；同时与SkyPilot合作推出零出口存储方案，允许用户在任何云上运行AI工作负载，数据仍存储于Hugging Face。
4. **Gemini API与AI代理扩展**：Google AI博客宣布Gemini API扩展托管智能体功能，新增后台任务、远程MCP支持等，进一步提升AI代理的自主能力。
5. **OpenAI模型与微软Copilot更新**：OpenAI发布GPT-5.6，成为Microsoft 365 Copilot首选模型，并强调其“前沿智能可随雄心扩展”；同时推出GPT-5.5生物漏洞赏金计划，ChatGPT被定位为“最雄心勃勃工作的合作伙伴”。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：OpenAI正式将GPT-5.6作为Microsoft 365 Copilot的默认模型，标志着前沿大模型在办公场景的深度落地，同时Hugging Face在推理加速、云部署和AI代理数据策略上的多线推进，凸显了AI行业从模型训练向工程化、代理化和零摩擦部署的全面转型。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **中国首次成功实现火箭第一级回收**：中国在轨道发射中首次完成可重复使用火箭第一级回收，这一技术突破对标SpaceX，展示了中国在航天领域的创新能力和成本控制进展。
2. **中国开源AI模型提升全球软实力**：中国开源人工智能模型的发展正在增强其国际影响力，成为软实力竞争中的关键因素。
3. **俄中“无限制”合作与星链议题**：报道提及俄罗斯与中国在反卫星技术（如“星链”相关领域）形成“无限制”伙伴关系，引发国际关注。
4. **企业动态与监管问题**：希音（Shein）获中国批准第三次赴港IPO；同时出现犯罪分子篡改公共二维码跳转至色情网站的“扫码诈骗”事件。
5. **科技融资挑战与争议**：有分析指出中国可能面临为高层科技愿景提供资金的困难；另报道称OpenAI和谷歌向被列入黑名单的中国机构出售AI模型，引发合规争议。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：中国首次成功回收火箭第一级，标志着可重复使用航天技术迈出历史性一步，为降低发射成本、提升太空竞争力奠定关键基础。
